title: Fix enum range constraints missing for rand variables in sub-objects (#7230)

features.name: enum typed rand variable in top-level class
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand enum-typed variable and randomize() call - this is the correct baseline behavior

features.name: enum typed rand variable in rand sub-object (one-level nesting)
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand sub-object containing an enum-typed rand variable, accessed via randomize() - triggers missing enum constraint bug

features.name: enum typed rand variable in two-level nested sub-objects
features.description: Code should include a class with two-level nested rand sub-objects where the innermost contains an enum-typed rand variable
